title: Davies in 'best ever' Canada squad for World Cup
summary: Jesse Marsch has called Canada's World Cup squad, featuring Bayern Munich defender Alphonso Davies, the best ever assembled for the competition. Davies' inclusion signals Canada's confidence heading into the summer tournament.
content: Head coach Jesse Marsch includes Bayern Munich defender Alphonso Davies in what he describes as the best Canada squad "ever assembled" for this summer's World Cup.

zh.title: 戴维斯入选加拿大有史以来最强世界杯阵容
zh.summary: 杰西·马尔施称加拿大世界杯阵容拥有拜仁慕尼黑后卫阿方索·戴维斯，是为该赛事组建的最强阵容。戴维斯的入选标志着加拿大对即将到来的夏季赛事充满信心。

title: What now for Vinicius Jr after Mourinho signs Real Madrid deal?
summary: Jose Mourinho's recent appointment at Real Madrid brings fresh attention to his relationship with star forward Vinicius Junior. How the experienced manager handles the Brazilian attacker will be one of the key storylines in Mourinho's second spell at the club.
content: How Jose Mourinho manages his relationship with Brazil forward Vinicius Junior will be one of the most closely watched aspects of his second spell in charge of Real Madrid.

zh.title: 穆里尼奥签约皇马后维尼修斯将何去何从
zh.summary: 何塞·穆里尼奥最近被任命为皇家马德里主教练，这引发了人们对他与巴西球星维尼修斯·朱尼奥的关系的新关注。这位经验丰富的主教练如何处理这位巴西前锋将成为穆里尼奥第二次执教皇马期间的关键故事线之一。

title: The tactics that could win Arsenal the Champions League
summary: As Arsenal prepares to face Paris St-Germain in Saturday's Champions League final, BBC Sport examines the tactical approaches that could secure victory. The analysis highlights the strategic decisions that will be crucial for Arsenal's pursuit of European glory.
content: BBC Sport's tactics correspondent Umir Irfan looks at how Arsenal can defeat Paris St-Germain in Saturday's Champions League final.

zh.title: 能为阿森纳赢得欧冠的战术
zh.summary: 当阿森纳准备在周六的欧冠决赛中对阵巴黎圣日耳曼时，BBC体育分析了可能确保胜利的战术方法。这分析突出了对阿森纳追求欧洲荣耀至关重要的战略决策。
